data.name: Hentai Tales: Infinite Climax-Endless Ecstasy
data.detailed_description:
遊戲玩法

在解開燒腦謎題的同時享受香豔刺激的劇情！
依照數字順序連接棋盤上的所有方格
成功解謎後即可解鎖全新誘惑畫面與後續劇情章節！
你能否解開所有謎題，與三位美少女共譜禁忌戀曲？！

故事背景

自從搬進這間公寓，我那平凡無奇的生活開始脫軌。
一切始於神社的偶然邂逅，自此與三名截然不同的女性發展出複雜而刺激的關係。
如今我的日常充斥著禁忌歡愉與秘密幽會，每一次交鋒都比前次更令人沉溺其中。

角色介紹

巫女－神社的少女：

恪守本分的年輕巫女，沉靜表相下隱藏著熱情順從的本性。純真外貌與門扉後日漸大膽的渴求形成危險反差。

金髮－狡黠的調情者：

熱衷掌控局勢的惡作劇系鄰居。擅長突破界限將日常場景化為情慾遊戲，永不停歇追求新鮮刺激玩法。

紅髮－直率的女獵手：

毫無保留追求快感的肉食系女子。大膽作風剝去所有曖昧遐想，每次交纏都將化作烙印記憶的熾烈體驗。

遊戲特色

  • 20張性感撩人的美少女圖片。
  • 與性格迥異的美少女們展開超現實豔遇劇情。
  • 可跳過解謎直接體驗劇情（解謎時按下Enter鍵）。
  • CG鑑賞模式（解謎完成後點擊CG兩側按鈕切換）。

data.name: Hentai Tales: Infinite Climax-Endless Ecstasy
data.detailed_description:
GamePlay

Enjoy a sensual story while completing tricky puzzles!
Connect the numbers sequentially, using all of the squares on the board
After completing a puzzle, you will unlock a sexy new image and the next part of the story!
Can you complete every puzzle and meet all of the girls?!

Story Background

I came to Longport with nothing. A year as a low-level enforcer for the Dragon Peace gang was just survival.
until my first real job went to hell. Betrayed, shot at, and on the run with a wounded superior, I'm plunged into a vicious power struggle...

Characters

Ma Ling:

A seasoned, battle-scarred lieutenant of the Dragon Peace. Fiercely loyal and tough as nails, she becomes your protector and guide after being critically wounded in an ambush. Her hardened exterior hides unexpected vulnerabilities.

Tan Cheng:

The young, ambitious, and ruthless heir to the Dragon Peace leadership. Her calculating plot to consolidate power triggers the story's central conflict, leading her to suffer devastating consequences and become entangled in your path to dominance.

Chen Lan:

A jaded and resourceful underground clinic doctor with her own addictions and secrets. Initially a neutral caretaker, her hidden allegiances put her at your mercy, revealing a submissive side beneath her weary façade.

Features

  • 20 sexy and erotic images of beautiful girls.
  • A fantastical erotic story with girls who have unique personalities.
  • You can skip the puzzles if you just want to enjoy the story. (Press Enter during a puzzle).
  • CG Gallery mode. (Click the left and right buttons next to the CG after completing a puzzle).
